final:
// // This module calculates the remainder first before the quotient
module divider_2bit (
    input [1:0] dividend,
    input [1:0] divisor,
    output reg [1:0] quotient,
    output reg [1:0] remainder
);
    always @(*) begin
        if (divisor != 0) begin
            quotient = dividend / divisor;
            remainder = dividend % divisor;
        end else begin
            quotient = 2'b00; // Handle division by zero case
            remainder = 2'b00; // Handle division by zero case
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module calculates the remainder first before the quotient
